titleStmt.title: SII 39.158: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 158. (A.R. No. 158 of 1916.) KAḶATTŪR, ARKONAM TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. SUKANĀTHĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE PARAKĒSARIVARMAN ALIAS RĀJĒNDRACHŌḺADĒVA-5TH YEAR (1017 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 182 mākāṇi of land for the supply of offerings and burning lamps in the temple of Kumbīśvaramauḍaiya mahādēva at Pañjirai kaḷattūr alias Vikramaśiṅga chatūrvēdimaṅgalam by the sabhā of the village. Also mentions a person Kūttaṉ-tiruveṅgadadēvaṉ an officer (adhikāri) of Uḍaiyapiraṭṭīyār, who supervised the gift. In addition to this a donation of 591 kuḻi of land was given to a person for the supply of turmeric sacred water regularly to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumaṉṉivaḷara
kopparakecari panmarāṉa śrī rājendracoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu Uṭaiya pi
rāṭṭiyār tirumaṭaip paḷḷipuṟam jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tāmaṟkoṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭup pāñcirai kaḷattūrāṉa vikkiramaciṅkaccaturveti maṅkalattu kumbhi
śvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku muṉpu Iṟaiyiḻiccik kuṭutta nilam patiṉaṟucāṇ kolāl koppuṭ kuṇṭil
nūṟṟeṇpattu Iraṇṭe Oru mākāṇiyum
damaged
mukkālum kumbhiśvaramuṭaiya mahātevaṟku tirumañcaṉa nīrkoṭuvantaṭṭuvāṉukku vaitta kuḻi Aiññūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Oṉṟarai
koṇṭu ceyyak kaṭavapaṭi tiruvamutu canti Oṉṟukku Arici nānāḻiyāka canti mūṉṟukku Arici kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyum
nicatam cantiviḷakku pattu koḷuttuvatāka śrībali bhokaṅ koṇṭu Uvaiccarkaḷ Ēḻāḷ koṇṭu koṭṭuvārkaḷākavum Amirutu ceyta naivedyaṅ koṇṭu Oruvaṉ tiruvalaku Iṭṭu tirumaṭaippaḷ
ḷikku viṟakiṭakkaṭavaṉākavum tevaṟku mūṉṟu cantikkum Āṟupākkum veṟṟilai 10 3 Aṭaikkāyamirtak kāṭṭuvatākavum civaprāhmaṇar nīrvilaiyum dūtum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa Alappiṟaiyum kāṭṭappeṟātatākavum Ipparicu māṇikaḷ tiruvākku tirunicatam
Aṭṭi Ittevar bhumakaḷil bhokaṅkoṇṭu kaṇapperumakkaḷe kuṟaivaṟuttuc ceyvippatākavum tirumuṟṟattil teṅkum Ācuvikaḷe teṅkum Itteṅkellāṅ koṇṭu Ucciyampotu sandhiviḷakku Iraṇṭu koḷuttuvatākavum Ipparicu cilālekhai ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ipparicu ślālekhai ceyvittār Uṭaiya pirāṭṭiyār Atikārikaḷ ciṟupāpi Uṭaiyāṉ kūttaṉ tiruveṅkaṭatevaṉeṉ Ivai Ivvūr karaṇattāṉ śivabrāhma
ṇaṉ taṇiyal parameśvaraṉāṉa śrī kaḷantai bhaṭṭaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu paṇikka Ivveḻuttu veṭṭiṉṉeṉ paṉṟi Amarakālaṉṉāṉa tirubhuvaṉamahādevvi Ācāryaṉṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 39.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
